hooks.command: s="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-/home/user/dotfiles}/.claude/hooks/sandbox-git-identity.sh"; [ -x "$s" ] || s="/home/user/dotfiles/.claude/hooks/sandbox-git-identity.sh"; if [ -x "$s" ]; then "$s"; else echo "WARNING: sandbox-git-identity.sh not found via \$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR or /home/user/dotfiles — git identity was NOT configured, commits will be misattributed to Claude. Locate and run the script from the dotfiles repo before committing."; fi
